title: Tangy Juicy Comforting Uruguayan Green Pepper Stir-fry
description: This tangy and juicy dish features green peppers in a comforting vegetarian-friendly stew that can be enjoyed as a side or main course.

ingredients.name: Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Fresh or canned, depending on availability and preference

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: To enhance the dish's flavor profile

ingredients.name: Vegetable Broth
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is packed with vegetables for a vegetarian-friendly option

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: For added tanginess and umami flavor

instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic, sautéing until translucent.
Add the green peppers and tomatoes. Cook for about 5 minutes or until softened slightly.
Pour in the vegetable broth and soy sauce (if using). Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
Stir in the cornstarch mixture dissolved in water or vegetable stock, blending well into the soup.
Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes until the mixture thickens and everything is heated through.
Season with salt and black pepper (if using). Serve hot.
